# noslop

> Agent-boundary quality gates for any repo. Installs git hooks, CI required checks, and Claude Code guardrails with one command. Supports 19 language packs. npm package: @45ck/noslop. Node.js 22+ required.

## Quick install

```sh
npm install -g @45ck/noslop
cd your-repo
noslop init
noslop doctor
```

## What it does

noslop installs three independent enforcement layers into an existing repository: local git hooks (pre-commit, pre-push, commit-msg), GitHub Actions CI workflows (required checks + guardrails), and Claude Code guardrails (.claude/settings.json deny rules + pre-tool-use hook). Each layer catches bypasses that slip past the previous one. Gates run your project's own toolchain — noslop installs the enforcement config, not the tools themselves.

## Key concepts

- **Gate**: A single quality check with a label, shell command, and tier. Value object.
- **Pack**: A named set of gates for a specific language. 19 packs ship with noslop.
- **Tier**: Execution context — `fast` (pre-commit: format, lint, spell), `slow` (pre-push: typecheck, tests), `ci` (GitHub Actions: full pipeline).
- **Protected path**: Files agents cannot edit after install (`.githooks/`, `.github/workflows/`, `.claude/`).

## Supported languages

| Pack | Detected by |
|------|-------------|
| TypeScript | `tsconfig.json`, `package.json` |
| JavaScript | not auto-detected — use `--pack javascript` |
| Rust | `Cargo.toml` |
| .NET / C# | `.csproj`, `.sln`, `global.json` |
| Python | `pyproject.toml`, `setup.py`, `requirements.txt` |
| Go | `go.mod` |
| Java | `pom.xml`, `build.gradle` (no `.kt` in `src/`) |
| Ruby | `Gemfile` |
| Kotlin | `build.gradle` + `.kt` files in `src/` |
| Swift | `Package.swift` |
| PHP | `composer.json` |
| Scala | `build.sbt` |
| Elixir | `mix.exs` |
| Dart | `pubspec.yaml` |
| Haskell | `.cabal` |
| Lua | `.rockspec` |
| C / C++ | `CMakeLists.txt` |
| Zig | `build.zig` |
| OCaml | `dune-project` |

## Commands

- `noslop init` — Detect packs, install templates, wire git hooks. Interactive.
- `noslop install` — Same as init but non-interactive. For CI and agents.
- `noslop check --tier=<fast|slow|ci>` — Run quality gates for the given tier.
- `noslop update` — Re-install hooks/CI from latest templates, preserve user configs.
- `noslop setup` — Interactive wizard with guided prompts.
- `noslop uninstall` — Remove all noslop infrastructure; leave user configs.
- `noslop doctor` — Verify hooks, CI, and Claude settings are present and wired.

## Exit codes

- `0` — Success. All checks/gates passed.
- `1` — Gate failure. One or more gates or doctor checks failed.
- `2` — Config error. Unknown pack, bad tier, missing target.

## Documentation

- [llms-full.txt](https://github.com/45ck/noslop/blob/main/llms-full.txt): Complete documentation in a single file for full context loading
- [README](https://github.com/45ck/noslop/blob/main/README.md): Full documentation
- [Coding agents guide](https://github.com/45ck/noslop/blob/main/docs/guides/coding-agents.md): Machine-readable install guide for AI agents
- [Glossary](https://github.com/45ck/noslop/blob/main/docs/glossary.md): Domain terms and architecture concepts
